ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the asset during the time frame */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset during the time frame */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price accounting for dividends and splits */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset during the time frame */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset (e.g., stock or ETF) this data relates to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the asset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, ETF, option) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange on which the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  " dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the strategy */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the strategy (e.g., conservative, aggressive) */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the strategy (e.g., long-term growth, short-term gains) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trader_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trader_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the profile was created */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* Current account balance of the trader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, download) */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trader_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being traded */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the asset being traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the order is placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., executed, pending) */,
  "order_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was placed */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss price for the order */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take-profit price for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trader_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_orders_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order history record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated trade order */,
  "executed_price" REAL /* Price at which the order was executed */,
  "executed_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity executed for the order */,
  "executed_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was executed */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the order execution */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the order execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset for which the alert is set */,
  "price_target" REAL /* Target price to trigger the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., above, below) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., one-time, recurring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trader_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset related to the comment */,
  "related_order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order related to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trader_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_related_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_order_id") REFERENCES trade_orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., order execution, price alert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES trader_profiles ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article analyzed */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the news article (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES news_articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the indicator was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the watchlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id")
)
